mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS name, COUNT(a.id) AS count FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 2 GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT id, title, summary, cover_image, category_id, author_id, status, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, tags, source, source_url, is_top, deleted, create_time, update_time FROM article WHERE id = #{id}
